MaxLineLength:GamePrices.kt$GamePrices$ItemCost(money = 1000, vegetableCosts = mapOf("tomato" to 200, "broccoli" to 75, "bell_pepper" to 30, "purple_onion" to 15))
MaxLineLength:GamePrices.kt$GamePrices$ItemCost(money = 1500, vegetableCosts = mapOf("tomato" to 400, "squash" to 75, "bell_pepper" to 30, "purple_onion" to 15))
MaxLineLength:GamePrices.kt$GamePrices$ItemCost(money = 750, vegetableCosts = mapOf("tomato" to 150, "broccoli" to 50, "bell_pepper" to 20, "purple_onion" to 15))
MaxLineLength:GamePrices.kt$GamePrices$val MOD_BROCCOLI_OVERCLOCKED = ItemCost(money = 1500, vegetableCosts = mapOf("broccoli" to 250, "bell_pepper" to 50))
MaxLineLength:GamePrices.kt$GamePrices$val UNLOCK_PURPLE_ONION = ItemCost(money = 500, vegetableCosts = mapOf("tomato" to 100, "broccoli" to 25, "bell_pepper" to 10))
MaxLineLength:GameScreen.kt$WeatherDialog(viewModel = viewModel, onDismiss = { showWeatherDialog = false }, onNavigateToStore = onNavigateToStore)
MaxLineLength:GameViewModel.kt$GameViewModel$itemsList.find { it.id == id }?.resource ?: ArtRepository.artEntries.find { it.id == id }?.resource ?: Res.drawable.tomato_strip
MaxLineLength:LibraryScreen.kt$val knowledgeRes = if (isSpanish) Res.drawable.knowledgespanish_strip else Res.drawable.knowledgeenglish_strip
MaxLineLength:StoreScreen.kt$val upgradesRes = if (isSpanish) Res.drawable.upgradesspanish_strip else Res.drawable.upgradesenglish_strip
MayBeConst:GamePrices.kt$GamePrices$// --- BASE CLICK REWARDS (Money) --- val REWARD_MONEY_TOMATO = 1
MayBeConst:GamePrices.kt$GamePrices$// --- SPECIAL REWARDS --- // Tomato Precision (Critical Hits) val REWARD_TOMATO_CRIT_MONEY = 30
MayBeConst:GamePrices.kt$GamePrices$// Apple High Frequency Bonus val REWARD_APPLE_HIGH_FREQ_MONEY = 5
MayBeConst:GamePrices.kt$GamePrices$// Bell Pepper Turbo Multiplier val MULTIPLIER_BELL_PEPPER_TURBO = 2
MayBeConst:GamePrices.kt$GamePrices$// Broccoli Overclocked Multiplier val MULTIPLIER_BROCCOLI_FAST = 2
MayBeConst:GamePrices.kt$GamePrices$// Garlic Explosion Bonuses val REWARD_GARLIC_EXPLOSION_MONEY = 20
MayBeConst:GamePrices.kt$GamePrices$// Purple Onion Spinning Bonus val REWARD_ONION_SPIN_MONEY_BASE = 5
UnusedPrivateProperty:MiscScreen.kt$val primaryText = if (wavy) Color.White else Color.Unspecified
